name: essentials
description: Skill development tools, wiki maintenance with knowledge pipeline (ingest with open-problem extraction to inbox, query, lint with state-cadence write-back, reduce, reflect, reweave), deep-research investigation pipeline, chief-of-staff second-brain orchestrator (daily/weekly/review/update cadences), scaffold-project skill for bootstrapping repos from templates, ideation-loop skill for moving from fuzzy intent to locked decisions (decision-sheet format, stop rule, hiring-lens filter), pressure-test skill for adversarial pressure-testing of claims/decisions/conclusions (five-mode failure rubric, falsifier requirement, evidence-tier classification), business-strategist agent for creating in-depth operational business plans, and web research agent for enhanced development workflow
